paper_or_dataset: GSE167956 HIF-dependent hypoxia response in SUM159
notes: GEO series metadata documents 3 biological replicates per oxygen condition and DESeq2 processing, but the deposited HIF-dependent workbook is a filtered gene-list-style supplement without full contrast-level LFC and p/FDR fields; not strict S0 evidence.

Downloaded raw-count workbook confirms a large gene universe and sample groups, but raw-count reanalysis is outside the locked S0 rule requiring as-published or GEO-deposited DEG statistics with gene, effect, and p/FDR fields.

Article reports 1,679 up- and 1,407 down-regulated genes after thresholding; this is a significant-DEG-scale supplement, below the full/near-full >=10,000-gene S0 threshold even before direct table download, and MDPI supplementary download returned HTTP 403 in this run.

Rechecked because GSE328627 remains a high-ranking hypoxia search hit; existing iter12 audit already excluded the direct oxygen table for significant/top-hit scale and insufficient replicate structure. Other GSE328627 supplements are HIF-PHI drug contrasts, not strict direct hypoxia-vs-normoxia evidence.
FTP listing exposes merged gene counts and TPM matrices only; no deposited contrast-level LFC plus p/FDR table for strict S0 inclusion.
FTP listing exposes an all-counts file only; no as-deposited direct hypoxia DEG statistics were found in the supplementary listing.
